series_metadata.series_description: These files contain information regarding the records for supervisory actions, including administrative proceedings related to supervisory actions, between the Ohio Division of Financial Institutions and state-chartered banks. The supervisory actions are a result of the findings from the examination process, and these records should be retained in accordance with Ohio Revised Code Section 1121.10(E).

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: paper copy in operating area imaged and indexed. Upon confirmation that paper copy has been checked quality and completeness, . ; Electronic: electronic files twenty (20) years date of termination of supervisory action
